name: Lemon Stand
description: Your humble beginning. Sell individual lemons for $1 each.

name: LemonDash Delivery
description: Automated delivery service. Bikes deliver lemonade to customers.

name: Lemon Depot
description: Wholesale lemon distribution. Refrigerated trucks for mass delivery.

name: Trading Floor
description: Trade lemon futures and derivatives. High-volume lemon economy.

name: Research Labs
description: Genetic lemon modification. Create new citrus varieties for premium pricing.

name: Citrus Republic
description: Establish a lemon-based currency. Government-sanctioned citrus trade.

name: Robotics Division
description: Fully automated lemon production. AI-powered juicing and delivery.

name: Space Station Lemon X
description: Grow lemons in zero gravity. The pinnacle of citrus cultivation.
